title: RGB photoreceptor lens
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''RGB photoreceptor lens''' were used by [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]] to develop [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droids]]. They were produced by [[Nelhal Industries]]. [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] was fitted with these lenses.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2006-09-25 -->''[[Star Wars: The Complete Visual Dictionary]]''
